summary: QA accepts the M3 SERP mock provider slice. Acceptance criteria are met, requested validators/tests/build passed, and no forbidden implementation scope expansion was found.

tests_run.result: Passed: Next.js production build completed with non-fatal Windows SWC warnings.

decisions: Accepted the provider interface and normalized result fields as aligned with docs/03_technical_architecture.md.
Accepted the deterministic mock implementation and unsupported-provider fail-fast behavior.
Accepted README and npm test script documentation for this slice.
risks: Build emits non-fatal @next/swc-win32-x64-msvc invalid Win32 application warnings.
Worktree includes JustGoal project metadata changes outside implementation artifacts.
requested_action: Proceed with orchestration after QA acceptance.
